statement: In every magma, Equation 525 (`x = y * (y * (z * (y * y)))`) implies Equation 2885 (`x = ((x * (y * z)) * x) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_1000
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op y (op z (op y y))))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op x (op y z)) x) w)
